rules.sigma:
title: CDB APEX v37.0 — BeatBanker: A dual‑mode Android Trojan
status: experimental
author: CyberDudeBivash SENTINEL APEX
date: 2026/03/20
logsource:
    category: firewall
detection:
    selection_dns:
        query:
            - '*accessor.fud2026.com*'
            - '*com.binance.dev*'
            - '*com.destination.cosmetics*'
            - '*com.wallet.crypto.trustapp*'
            - '*dalvik.system*'
            - '*fud2026.com*'
            - '*ipapi.is*'
    condition: selection_ip
level: high
